## Source: ossf-package-analysis (4025b0ac5fa876e2c465db2fdd4fab6d93919502a53d1c0673411e3515cd3e72)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@mesh-helpers/themehelper' @ 99999.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
